attr.title: Pokemon Tectonic
attr.desc: Pokémon Tectonic is a fan-made Pokémon RPG set in the underground-focused Makya region. It features a nonlinear story, extensive side quests, and a major rebalance of Pokémon, moves, and abilities so every Pokémon is viable. The game includes Pokémon up to Generation 8, regional forms, new evolutions, and quality-of-life improvements, with a strong emphasis on strategy and exploration.
attr.inst: Use the direct download option from https://www.tectonic-game.com and add the zip file to the `pkmn_tectonic` folder. On first launch the game will be unzipped for you.
